title: Gmail API access denied due to verification process
symptom: When attempting to use the Gmail API, an error 403 with 'access_denied' is displayed, indicating that the app is not verified.
not_this_if: Using a verified app or different API integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application has not completed the Google verification process. As a result, access is restricted to only developer-approved testers, preventing normal users from utilizing the API.
fix_steps: Update the API scope in your Google Cloud Project
Add test users to the project settings
Create new credentials in n8n using the updated settings
agent_instruction: Update the API scope and add test users in your Google Cloud Project, then create new credentials in n8n.
